design_philosophy.core_loop: Select Robot Master stage → defeat boss to acquire weapon → use weapon weakness chain to progress through remaining stages → access Wily fortress with acquired tools
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Strategic weapon selection and stage order optimization combined with precise platforming execution and boss pattern memorization
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Become a versatile combat robot that absorbs enemy abilities and grows stronger through tactical progression, culminating in confronting the mad scientist architect
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Game emphasizes player agency through stage selection order and weapon weakness chains, creating meaningful strategic depth. Rejects linear progression in favor of player-determined path through eight Robot Masters. Password system enables save-scumming and experimentation without penalty. Introduction of Energy Tanks fundamentally changes difficulty curve by allowing health management outside of boss fights.

difficulty.lives_system: Standard lives system with Game Over on depletion
difficulty.continues_system: Password system allows resuming from any completed Robot Master stage, effectively unlimited continues with save state equivalent
difficulty.checkpointing: Password-based checkpointing after each Robot Master defeat; no mid-stage checkpoints within individual levels
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: High - International releases include selectable difficulty modes (Normal/Difficult). Player can choose stage order to find favorable weapon matchups. Energy Tanks provide player-controlled health management. Password system allows retry without progression loss.

progression.upgrade_system: Weapon acquisition via Robot Master defeat. Each weapon has limited ammo tied to weapon-specific energy meter. Energy Tanks provide health recovery items. Special items (platforms/mobility tools) unlock access to previously inaccessible areas within stages.
progression.unlock_mechanism: Robot Master weaknesses create soft gating - stages are accessible but easier with correct weapon. Wily fortress requires defeating all eight Robot Masters. Special platform items gated behind specific stage completions.
replayability_hooks: Stage selection order optimization for weapon weakness chains
Password system enables experimenting with different stage sequences
Difficulty modes (Normal vs Difficult) in international versions
Energy Tank collection and management strategy
Boss pattern memorization for optimal weapon usage timing

world_building_techniques: Robot Master theme integration with stage environment design (Air Man in sky-themed level, Wood Man in forest stage)
Weapon mechanics reflect master's identity (tornado projectiles for Air Man, leaf shield for Wood Man)
Stage aesthetics reinforce Robot Master characteristics
Minimal dialogue; story conveyed through opening sequence and final boss encounter sequence

boss_design.philosophy: Each Robot Master presents distinct combat challenge with signature weapon and attack patterns. Bosses vulnerable to specific other Robot Master weapons, creating strategic progression tree. Designed for pattern memorization with learnable attack sequences.
notable_bosses: Metal Man - blade projectile attacks, straightforward combat pattern
Air Man - tornado generation and movement-based attacks, requires precise timing
Bubble Man - projectile-based aquatic themed combat
Quick Man - high-speed movement and attack patterns, tests execution skill
Crash Man - dynamic platforming arena interaction
Flash Man - time-stop mechanic introduces tactical pause element
Heat Man - fire-based attacks with environmental hazard potential
Wood Man - shield-based defense with leaf projectile offense
Dr. Wily - multi-phase final boss with machine transformation, holographic projection mechanics

faction_indicators: Robot Master lineup represents Wily's engineering philosophy - eight different combat specializations
Dr. Light vs Dr. Wily opposition establishes moral binary
Mega Man as instrument of Light's will vs autonomous agent question
danger_signals: Dr. Wily's escalation from previous game (creates entirely new Robot Master set)
Fortress construction indicates sustained threat commitment
Alien impersonation deception attempt shows willingness to manipulate through false information
Mercy plea suggests Wily seeks redemption or plots future revenge
environmental_storytelling: Eight thematically distinct stage environments reflect Robot Master specializations
Wily fortress architecture suggests industrial/military complex
Final cave sequence beneath fortress implies hidden infrastructure
Stage progression from themed locales to fortress interior tracks player's approach toward antagonist
